mapper.insert: INSERT INTO step_execution (id, execution_id, step_name, status, start_time, end_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{executionId}, #{stepName}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{endTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, execution_id, step_name, status, start_time, end_time FROM step_execution WHERE execution_id = #{executionId} ORDER BY start_time
